caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely participating in a podcast or radio show titled "Boss Talk 101." He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a t-shirt with bold text. The setting appears to be a casual studio within a clothing store, as evidenced by the racks of clothes and mannequins in the background. The walls are adorned with numerous framed photographs, adding a personal touch to the environment. In the sequence of images, the man is seen speaking into the microphone, gesturing with his right hand for emphasis, indicating an engaging conversation or discussion. The overall atmosphere suggests a relaxed yet professional recording session.
